overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city street. The player moves from a sunlit green sidewalk, crosses an intersection, passes under a concrete overpass with a Militech military checkpoint, and continues along a debris-filled construction area. The scene features bright midday lighting, vivid neon colors, and dense cyberpunk urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the green-tiled sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: distinctive green paved pedestrian walkway with geometric patterns
tall building covered in vertical neon signs and holographic advertisements
futuristic skyscrapers with glass and steel architecture rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a bright green-tiled sidewalk in a futuristic cyberpunk city. Neon signs cover the building facades to the left while tall towers rise ahead. The camera approaches a yellow crosswalk under clear midday sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with corner building and overpass approach

events.description: steps onto yellow crosswalk and turns right around corner building
enters shadow cast by overhead concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and navigating around the curved corner of a building

entered.detail: curved concrete building corner with air conditioning units and barred windows
massive elevated highway or monorail structure casting shadows ahead
blue and white automated vending machine on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk and turning right around a curved building corner. The concrete overpass ahead creates deepening shadows as the camera approaches the underpass entrance, passing a vending machine on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass with military checkpoint and steam vents

events.description: passes Militech armored vehicle and armed soldier checkpoint on the right

agents.ego_description: walking through the shadowed underpass past the military checkpoint

notable_agents.action: Militech soldier in tactical gear standing guard beside the armored vehicle

entered.detail: black armored SUV with Militech corporation branding and red accents
armed guard in military uniform standing near the vehicle
steam rising from ground vents along the building wall

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive concrete overpass through a shaded corridor. A Militech armored vehicle and armed soldier occupy the right side near steam vents. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction through the sheltered underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with shops and advertisements

events.description: passes deeper into the covered commercial area with digital signage

agents.ego_description: continuing under the overpass past shop fronts and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in distinctive outfit standing near the Nicola Cola advertisement

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement board for Nicola Cola beverage
storefronts with awnings and neon signage including a 24-hour shop

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the covered walkway beneath the overpass, passing by shop fronts and large digital advertisements including a prominent Nicola Cola sign. Pedestrians populate the shaded sidewalk as the camera moves through the commercial underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with construction barriers and debris

events.description: exits shadow of overpass back into bright direct sunlight
passes construction barriers and scattered trash along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunlit sidewalk past construction areas and urban debris

entered.detail: red and white striped barriers blocking off a construction zone
tall palm trees lining the street beyond the construction area
massive holographic advertisements and building-sized digital screens
scattered garbage, cardboard boxes, and urban litter along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into bright sunlight, walking along an open sidewalk lined with construction barriers and scattered debris. Palm trees and massive digital billboards tower ahead, with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sun-drenched city sidewalk through a shaded industrial underpass and back into the bright urban light. It begins along a green-tiled walkway lined with neon signs and towering skyscrapers, moving steadily toward a yellow crosswalk under clear midday sunlight. As the camera crosses the street and rounds a curved building, the environment shifts from open brightness into the deepening shadows of a massive concrete overpass. The scene then transitions into a sheltered corridor populated by pedestrians, passing a Militech armored vehicle and glowing digital advertisements like a Nicola Cola sign. Finally, the camera emerges from the shade back into the brilliant sun, moving past construction barriers and debris toward distant skyscrapers and towering billboards.
